title: Natural Prehistory Spawns
description: An add-on for Similar Prehistory that enables the natural spawning of its creatures.
body:
WHEN DINOSAURS RULED THE EARTH!

This add-on only enables the natural spawning of creatures from "[Similar Prehistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/similar-prehistory)" add-on from the "Unusual Prehistory" mod created by p33ko32213.

This add-on does NOT include new creatures or biomes. All creatures belong to their respective mod.

Compatibility with creatures from Unusual Prehistory 2 has been removed from version 2.0.0 onwards due to the release of its official add-on "[Unusual Spawning](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unusual-spawning)".

Compatibility with other Unusual Prehistory 2 add-ons will be added after their release.

The current list of biomes where creatures spawn is:

Similar Prehistory (Add-on):

- Charonosaurus: Plains, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga.

- Coahuilasaurus: Savanna, Sparse Jungle, Wooded Badlans, Desert.

- Dakotaraptor: Forest, Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Snowy Taiga.

- Latenivenatrix: Dark Forest, Forest, Wooded Badlans, Old Growth Birch Forest (Only at Night).

- Oxalaia: River, Beach, Swamp, Warm Ocean.

- Sinosaurus: Wooded Badlands, Bamboo Jungle, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Jungle.



For more information about the mod, questions, suggestions, and news, join our Discord server. [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/dy5cC6UbAP).
